role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (arid high-plains) consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types (bunchgrasses) and biome classification without drifting into geology.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, delineator posts, and fencing standards appropriate for the role.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera rig shadow and infrastructure style as cross-domain identifiers, fitting the role.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided grounded evidence, and the tournament correctly synthesized the meta and regulatory evidence to distinguish the US from the closest competitor (Canada).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of arid grassland and blue sky match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of dormant bunchgrasses match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of yellow center lines and delineator posts match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of camera shadow and fence styles match image.
